title: Senior Radiologist at LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India
company: LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India:
LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India!
